case_title: ROSEMRY WILLIAMS VS. ROBERT MASON ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100016804)

FEE PAID ON: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR EXTENSION OF TIME TO SERVE PLEADING AND ORDER EXTENDING TIME TO SERVE AND ORDER CONTINUING CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE (TRANSACTION ID # 100008488) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, ROSEMRY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-12-2017 CONTINUED TO MAY-24-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-11-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-24-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, ROSEMRY AS TO DEFENDANT MASON, ROBERT DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-12-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-06-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-20-2017
ORDER EXTENDING TIME TO SERVE TO MAR-07-2017 GRANTED; EX PARTE APPLICATION
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-11-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
